findings.description: isEqualToString: called in authentication function (parameters unresolved)

evidence.note: String comparison in auth context — likely comparing against hardcoded or locally-stored credential

findings.impact: Client-side authentication can be bypassed by hooking the comparison method to always return true
findings.recommendation: Implement server-side authentication; client should only send credentials, not validate them locally
